content.json:
# XdrLogRaider — Connector Health

Operator-facing dashboard for the XdrLogRaider Defender XDR portal-only telemetry connector.

Panels:
1. Per-tier last-fresh poll markers (5 capability tiers + heartbeat)
2. Auth chain failures last 24h (AppExceptions filtered to AuthChain.*)
3. DLQ depth and oldest-entry age
4. Freshness SLI per consolidated category
5. Per-row partial-success rate per stream
6. Service account sign-in anomaly summary (uses $(SERVICE_ACCOUNT_UPN) deployment parameter)

For triage workflows see [docs/RUNBOOK.md](https://github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider/blob/main/docs/RUNBOOK.md).

content.query:
MDE_Heartbeat_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize LastSeenUtc = max(TimeGenerated), HeartbeatCount = count(), TotalRowsIngested = sum(RowsIngested) by FunctionName
| extend StaleMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeenUtc)
| extend Status = case(
    FunctionName == 'Connector-Heartbeat'           and StaleMinutes <= 10,    'Healthy',
    FunctionName == 'Defender-ActionCenter-Refresh' and StaleMinutes <= 20,    'Healthy',
    FunctionName == 'Defender-XspmGraph-Refresh'    and StaleMinutes <= 120,   'Healthy',
    FunctionName == 'Defender-Configuration-Refresh' and StaleMinutes <= 720,  'Healthy',
    FunctionName == 'Defender-Inventory-Refresh'    and StaleMinutes <= 2880,  'Healthy',
    FunctionName == 'Defender-Maintenance-Refresh'  and StaleMinutes <= 20160, 'Healthy',
    'Stale'
)
| project FunctionName, Status, StaleMinutes, LastSeenUtc, HeartbeatCount, TotalRowsIngested
| sort by FunctionName asc
content.title: Per-capability poll freshness (last vs cadence threshold)

content.query:
AppExceptions
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ErrorClass = tostring(Properties.ErrorClass)
| where ErrorClass startswith 'AuthChain.'
| summarize FailureCount = count() by ErrorClass, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Auth chain failures over time (AppExceptions where ErrorClass startswith AuthChain.)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name in ('xdr.ingest.dlq_depth', 'xdr.ingest.dlq_oldest_age_seconds')
| summarize MaxValue = max(Value) by Name, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
| render timechart
content.title: DLQ depth and oldest-entry age over time

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == 'xdr.ingest.row_age_seconds'
| extend Stream = tostring(Properties.Stream)
| summarize p95FreshnessSeconds = percentile(Value, 95) by Stream
| sort by p95FreshnessSeconds desc
content.title: Freshness SLI per stream (p95 row age in seconds)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name == 'xdr.ingest.row_success_rate'
| extend Stream = tostring(Properties.Stream)
| summarize MinSuccessRate = min(Value), AvgSuccessRate = avg(Value) by Stream
| extend Health = case(MinSuccessRate >= 0.99, 'Healthy', MinSuccessRate >= 0.90, 'Degraded', 'Failed')
| sort by MinSuccessRate asc
content.title: Per-stream partial-success rate (min/avg in window)
Service account sign-in activity (uses $(SERVICE_ACCOUNT_UPN) deployment parameter — see XdrOps-ServiceAccountAnomalousSignIn rule)
